headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Synopsys, Raises Price Target to $505
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Joe Quatrochi   maintains Synopsys (NASDAQ:SNPS) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $450 to $505.
